title: create_booking_restricted_to_sundays_and_mondays
description: Verify that booking creation is only allowed on Sundays and Mondays. Attempt to create bookings on other days and ensure they are rejected.

title: prevent_double_booking_for_same_slot
description: Test that the system prevents double-booking by locking the database record during booking creation. Attempt to book the same slot concurrently and verify only one booking is successful.

title: successful_payment_processing_before_booking_confirmation
description: Ensure that payment processing via Razorpay is completed successfully before confirming a booking. Test order creation and payment signature verification.

title: automated_email_confirmation_after_successful_booking
description: Verify that an automated booking confirmation email is sent via EmailJS immediately after a successful booking and payment.

title: jwt_authentication_for_admin_routes
description: Test that all protected admin API routes require valid JWT authentication tokens and reject unauthorized access.

title: razorpay_order_creation_api_functionality
description: Validate the /api/payments/order POST endpoint for creating Razorpay orders, ensuring correct order details and response.
